strengths: 17 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq demonstrates live, practical AI tooling exposure
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective and multiple open-source projects shows sustained builder mentality and product ownership
concerns: No advanced degree in AI; holds a BS in Computer Science — the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field is absent
No evidence of director-level IC scope: no strategic customer advisory work, no cross-org influence at scale, no external thought leadership
AI experience is narrow and very recent, limited to MCP tooling — no background in ML, cloud AI platforms, or recognized AI product leadership
response.justification: Bogdan has genuine tenure and a broad technical foundation, and his recent pivot toward AI agent infrastructure is directionally relevant. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role requires director-level individual contributor impact — advising strategic enterprise customers, shaping cloud and AI product direction, and serving as a recognized external voice on AI. None of that appears in this resume. His AI exposure is shallow and recent, confined to MCP code generation rather than deep ML, large-scale cloud AI platforms, or AI product strategy. The gap between his current seniority as a Staff/Senior engineer and the Director-level IC expectations of this role is too wide to bridge with a standard interview process.
